RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Empowered Spell
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: Pour raw force into your magic: a solid boost to spell power.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Careful Spell
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: Shape your magic safely: you take less damage in the chaos of battle.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Subtle Spell
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: Cast without tell: composed under pressure and more persuasive.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Agonizing Blast
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: Your eldritch power lands harder: a boost to spell power.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Devil's Sight
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: See through darkness: better ranged accuracy.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Armor of Shadows
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: A standing ward of gloom: better armour.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Fiendish Resilience
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: Your patron's vitality: harder to hurt and harder to drop.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Beguiling Influence
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: Otherworldly charm: people bend to your words.

RimHeroes.FeatDef.label: Eldritch Mind
RimHeroes.FeatDef.description: An anchored mind: very hard to break.
